@@ -28,1 +28,1 @@ - * 8342705 8371021 8373526 + * 8342705 8371021 8373526 8384065 @@ -175,0 +175,30 @@ + /** + * Empty ctor + */ + public A() {} + + /** + * Single param ctor + */ + public A(int i) {} + + /** + * A ctor with many params + */ + public A(int i, int j, int x, int y, String s, boolean b) {} + + /** + * A method without parameters + */ + public void noParams() {} + + /** + * A method with a single parameter + */ + public void oneParam(String s) {} + + /** + * A method with lots of parameters + */ + public void manyParams(String s, int i, int j, boolean b, double d, double e) {} + @@ -220,0 +250,23 @@ + checkOrder("pkg1/A.html", + """ +
    +
  1. Description
    2. +
  2. Nested Class Summary

    4. +
  4. Method Summary
    5. +
  5. Constructor Details +
      +
    1. A()
      2. +
    2. A(int)
      3. +
    3. A(int, int, int, int, String, boolean)
      4. +
    +
    6. +
  6. Method Details +
      +
    1. noParams()
      2. +
    2. oneParam(String)
      3. +
    3. manyParams(String, int, int, boolean, double, double)
      4. +
    +
    7. +
"""); +
